fomod.Name: Logitech G-series Wheel Mod
fomod.Author: Grant Perdue
fomod.Description: Cyberpunk 2077 support for Logitech G-series steering wheels (G25, G27, G29, G920, G923, Driving Force, Driving Force Pro, Driving Force GT, Momo Racing, WingMan Formula Force). Reads the wheel via the Logitech Steering Wheel SDK, injects inputs into the game's vehicle system via a RED4ext plugin, and drives physics-aware FFB (cornering, collisions, slip-angle countersteer) back to the wheel. Rev-strip LEDs follow real engine RPM; switches to a music visualizer when the in-car radio is on.
